text.title: devops-platform-policy-finops Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for devops-platform-policy-finops as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Switching Gatekeeper constraints directly to enforce mode on an existing cluster without a dry-run period.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Existing legitimate workloads without the required labels or resource limits will be blocked immediately on the next reconciliation or update. This creates an incident instead of a compliance improvement. Always dry-run for 2 weeks and fix violations before enforcing.
